name: Commvault
description: Enterprise backup, recovery, and data management platform for cloud, virtual, and physical environments

credentialFields.label: Commvault Server URL
credentialFields.helpText: Your Commvault Web Console or Command Center URL (e.g., https://commvault.company.com)

credentialFields.label: Username
credentialFields.helpText: Commvault admin username with REST API access

checks.name: Backup Logs
checks.description: Reviews recent backup jobs to identify failures, warnings, and overall backup health across the Commvault environment

checks.name: Infrastructure Inventory
checks.description: Lists all clients and servers registered in Commvault for backup and data protection coverage

checks.name: Monitoring & Alerting
checks.description: Checks for active alerts and alert rule configurations in Commvault to ensure monitoring is in place
